overview: CMR College of Engineering & Technology (CMRCET), established in 2002 by the MGR Educational Society, is a premier autonomous institution located in Kandlakoya, Hyderabad. It is one of the most sought-after colleges in the CMR Group, known for its strong emphasis on research, innovation, and industry-oriented training.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. Several undergraduate programs are accredited by NBA. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45-50% in PCM + TS EAMCET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (Computer Science, Structural Engg, Embedded Systems, etc.)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE/TS PGECET

admissions.admissionProcess: 70% of seats are under the Convener Quota (Category A) filled via state-level web counseling. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit/JEE scores. Lateral entry for diploma holders is through TS ECET.
admissions.importantDates: TS EAMCET 2026: May 9 - 11, 2026; TS ICET 2026: May 13 - 14, 2026; Results: Late May 2026.

campus.specialNote: CMRCET is home to various specialized professional chapters like IEEE, ISTE, and CSI. It is recognized as a center for excellence in collaborative research and holds multiple MOUs with global tech leaders for skill certification.
